title: Progress EK5882 Cone To Cup Citrus Juicer - Includes Small & Large Interchangeable Juicing Cones, Straight To Glass Serving, Multidirectional Rotation For More Juice, Built-In Anti-Drip Spout, 60W
features: Make your own fruit juice without hidden additives and preserve 100% of the nutrients and vitamins with this Progress Cone To Cup Citrus Juicer.
Two juicing cones are included - Use the smaller cone for fruits such as lemons & limes,and the larger one for oranges & grapefruits.
Push down the fruit onto the cone to automatically start juicing and the multidirectional rotation ensures more juice is extracted.
The built-in anti-drip spout allows you to easily juice straight into a glass ready to drink with no spills!
This freestanding citrus press has a 60w motor for easy operation, the lid and spout are detachable for easy cleaning in warm soapy water.
description: Product Description Progress Cone To Cup Fruit Juicer Create fresh juice instantly with the Progress Cone To Cup Citrus Juicer. Two interchangeable cones attachments are included for both small and larger fruits such as lemons, limes, oranges and grapefruits. Designed with a built-in anti-drip spout you can easily juice straight into a glass ready to drink with no spills! Powered by a 60W motor, this electric juicer has multidirectional rotation for a maximum extraction of juice, nutrients, and vitamins so you can get your 5-a-day the easy way. Previous page 2 Juicing Cones Use the smaller cone for fruits such as lemons & limes and the larger one for oranges & grapefruits. Easy To Use Push down the fruit onto the cone to automatically start juicing Anti-Drip Spout Juice straight into a glass ready to drink with no spills! Natural Juicing Make your own fruit juice without hidden additives and preserve 100% of the nutrients and vitamins Next page 1 2 Juicing Cones 2 Easy To Use 3 Anti-Drip Spout 4 Preservative Free Juice Est.1931 Innovation & Progression Established in 1931, Lancashire brand Progress has always strived to be at the forefront of style and design, whilst never forgetting what makes a kitchen the heart of any home. The focus of innovation and progressions has enabled Progress to now provide an extensive range of products with a modern, clean-cut twist. A classic brand with a 21st century feel, Progress offers everything a kitchen could possibly need.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Small Cone, Large Cone, Interchangeable Cones, Straight to Glass, Multidirectional Rotation, Lemon, Lime, Grapefruit, Orange, Fruits, Detachable Spout and Lid, Easy to Clean
